reviews.review_description: A very enjoyable ride full of bright colors, great graphics and wonderful sound. I really enjoy it.

Fun ride design with plenty of unexpected twists, big drops, and soaring leaps. But graphics range from pretty good to very average depending on ride section. Way too fast in some sections with sharp turns basically breaks the immersion. Biggest problem is on my s7 it has just a little stutter for about half the ride making it nearly unplayable. Almost felt like the original Rilix in places, but needs improvement to be worth more than $1

developer_response.body:
Hello, the issue should be fixed now. Please check it out and please consider changing the review if we manage to fix it.

Thank you,
Sebastian

reviews.review_description: After upgrading my galaxy s9+ to android, the game won't be installed. Now the developer updated the game and it is working wonderfully.
Not for the faint hearted. If the only thing you want to do as you ride this insanely speedy and wild coaster is hold onto your stomach this is the ride for you.
Although i gave it 5 stars i still think the graphics and details need a little more improvement and polishing and if so maybe extend the ride as well. but other than that its awesome.
Beautiful artwork, great music. I wish it ended differently.
